discovery.name: Composition II
discovery.statement: The archive speaks first through the language already carried by its titles, descriptions, and collection identities.

evidence.inclusionPolicy: same visible holdings as Composition I

transformations.output: lowercase alphanumeric terms with diacritics preserved
term frequency and distinct source-work count
descending source-work frequency with alphabetical tie-break
compressed archive utterance and traceable lexical ledger

presentation.title: Language composition
presentation.differenceRule: Typographic scale may vary only with distinct source-work frequency.

lineage.revisionTrigger: A normalization, stop-word, counting, ordering, or rendering change requires a new grammar version.

authority.claims: The displayed terms recur within the selected archive's source language.
authority.doesNotClaim: Recurrence determines authorial intention, semantic truth, or final interpretation.
